/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/hairStyleBuddy.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/hairStyleBuddy.dir/hairStyleBuddy_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hairStyleBuddy.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hairStyleBuddy.dir/src/backend/AppController.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hairStyleBuddy.dir/src/backend/models/AppointmentModel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hairStyleBuddy.dir/src/backend/models/ServiceModel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hairStyleBuddy.dir/src/backend/services/LocalDbService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hairStyleBuddy.dir/src/backend/services/SettingsService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hairStyleBuddy.dir/hairstylebuddy_qmltyperegistrations.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hairStyleBuddy.dir/build/.qt/rcc/qrc_qmake_HairStyleBuddy.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hairStyleBuddy.dir/build/.rcc/qmlcache/hairStyleBuddy_qmlcache_loader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hairStyleBuddy.dir/build/.rcc/qmlcache/hairStyleBuddy_qml/Main_qml.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hairStyleBuddy.dir/build/.rcc/qmlcache/hairStyleBuddy_qml/ActionTile_qml.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hairStyleBuddy.dir/build/.rcc/qmlcache/hairStyleBuddy_qml/PageHeader_qml.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hairStyleBuddy.dir/build/.rcc/qmlcache/hairStyleBuddy_qml/HomePage_qml.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hairStyleBuddy.dir/build/.rcc/qmlcache/hairStyleBuddy_qml/AppointmentsPage_qml.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hairStyleBuddy.dir/build/.rcc/qmlcache/hairStyleBuddy_qml/ServicesPage_qml.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hairStyleBuddy.dir/build/.qt/rcc/qrc_hairStyleBuddy_raw_qml_0.cpp.o -o hairStyleBuddy  /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libQt6QuickControls2.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libQt6Sql.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libQt6Quick.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libQt6OpenGL.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libQt6Qml.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libQt6Network.so.6.10.2 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.10.2
